title: Paul Mastoridis: How to Lead Digital Transformation Inside Pharma
description: Many pharmaceutical companies are investing heavily in digital tools, artificial intelligence (AI), and connected health platforms in an effort to modernize how therapies are developed and delivered. title: Firmus’ Oliver Curtis set for green light to run ASX-listed company
description: The convicted insider trader has been given informal clearance by the exchange to stay on the board after the artificial intelligence firm’s blockbuster IPO.
content:
Firmus co-founder Oliver Curtis has been informally cleared to oversee and run a publicly listed company despite his criminal record, paving the way for him to lead his $6 billion artificial intelligence business to the ASX this year.
